zh.lifeSummary: 當Godechilde de Tosny於1108年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，她的父親Raoul Ralph de Tosny III28歲，母親Adelise of Huntingdon30歲。她於1127年與Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1143年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godechilde de Tosny于1108年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德时，她的父亲Raoul Ralph de Tosny III28岁，母亲Adelise of Huntingdon30岁。她于1127年与Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1143年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

en.lifeSummary: When Godechilde de Tosny was born in 1108, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, was 28 and her mother, Adelise of Huntingdon, was 30. She married Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg in 1127, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1143.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godechilde de Tosny est née en 1108, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelise of Huntingdon, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg en 1127, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée après 1143.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godechilde de Tosny 1108 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul Ralph de Tosny III 28 und ihre Mutter Adelise of Huntingdon 30. Sie hat 1127 in Frankreich Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1143.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godechilde de Tosny è nata il nel 1108 nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Adelise of Huntingdon, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg nel 1127, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1143.

ja.lifeSummary: Godechilde de Tosnyが1108年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Raoul Ralph de Tosny IIIは28歳，母Adelise of Huntingdonは30歳であった。1127年にフランスでRobert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1143年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godechilde de Tosny(이)가 1108년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul Ralph de Tosny III(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise of Huntingdon(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1127년 프랑스에서 Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godechilde de Tosny nasceu em 1108, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelise of Huntingdon, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg em 1127, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1143.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godechilde de Tosny родилась в 1108 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Raoul Ralph de Tosny III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise of Huntingdon, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg в 1127 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1143 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godechilde de Tosny nació en 1108, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelise of Huntingdon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg en 1127, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1143.
